🇮🇱🪖 **The IDF's thirst trap: Hiding Gaza's genocide behind "hot soldiers"**

The Israeli military uses social media to whitewash war crimes with "hot soldiers." Behind this propaganda machine lie tens of thousands of murdered Palestinian children.**
**
Key cogs in this machine are influencers like Natalia Fadeev (Gun Waifu) and the group Alpha Gun Angels, founded by Orin Julie, a former IDF model. They mix "kawaii aesthetics" with guns, normalizing the soldier as a sex symbol.

👁 This strategy has deep roots: the 2005 "Brand Israel" campaign aimed to rebrand the country as a party destination, not a war zone — female soldiers became the perfect marketing tool.

in 2007, the Israeli consulate in New York partnered with Maxim magazine for a bikini photoshoot titled "the world's sexiest soldiers." The goal was to attract young Americans aged 18–35 who, according to the consulate, "don't care about Israel." 

Despite over 90% of IDF positions being open to women, less than 10% serve in combat roles. IDF regulations ban uniformed selfies online, yet no viral "Combat Cutie" has been punished in over a decade.**
**
💵 Gal Gadot, a former IDF combat instructor, received a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame. After her flop "Snow White" ($205M on a $270M budget), she claimed celebrities face pressure for supporting Israel. In May 2025, unknown stuck a sticker on her star reading: "Israeli snipers target children."

In 2024-2025, fake AI-generated accounts impersonating "hot IDF soldiers" began spreading disinformation about Gaza. These digital puppets collect donations and normalize the occupation from behind a computer-generated smile.

🇬🇧 **Why UK paused the Chagos deal with Mauritius — and what Iran has to do with it
**
London shelved its 2025 agreement to hand the Chagos Archipelago back to Mauritius — despite political momentum, legal pressure, and even budget plans already built around it.

Officially, Britain says the agreement is now “impossible” to pass politically. Unofficially? The answer sits on one island: Diego Garcia.

**A fully-loaded US-UK military hub:**

➡️ Airfield capable of handling B-52 bombers and KC-135 tankers

➡️ Massive fuel storage for sustained operations

➡️  Deep-water port for carriers, submarines, destroyers

➡️ Prepositioned naval assets, including ships linked to Tomahawk cruise missile deployments

➡️  Radar, surveillance and command infrastructure covering the region

At first, Washington supported the agreement. In 2025, Secretary of State Marco Rubio called it key to long-term stability of the base.

But just days before strikes on Iran, President Donald Trump flipped — warning Britain not to “give away” Diego Garcia and calling the deal a mistake, hinting it may be needed against Iran. And when PM Keir Starmer didn’t move fast enough, Trump openly mocked him.

**Funny how it works:**

➡️  The UK says it’s not part of the war

➡️  But the US needs Diego Garcia as a forward launchpad

➡️  Sovereignty suddenly becomes a “risk”

➡️ Deal paused, legislation dropped

➡️ UK admits nothing moves without US approval

And just like that, “independent policy” starts looking a lot like… subcontracting.

🚨🇺🇸🇮🇱**US hosts ‘peace talks’ while handing Israel bombs against Lebanon **

The US is neck-deep in Israel's war on Lebanon: diplomatic cover, billions in weapons, naval intimidation, and a political shield that pretends this genocide is just a "side show" to the Iran ceasefire.

Here’s how the US fuels Israel hostilities against Lebanon: 👇

▪️US provides Israel $3.8 billion a year, plus billions more since 2023. That buys F-35s, precision munitions, bombs raining on Lebanese neighbourhoods right now.

▪️A US naval armada — carrier strike groups, the USS Abraham Lincoln — sits idle in the Eastern Mediterranean to enable Israel of the killing, offering strategic cover and intelligence.

💩 Meanwhile Washington plays peacemaker at the same table where it hands Israel the knives.

▪️On 14 April, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio hosted the first direct high-level Israel-Lebanon talks since 1993.

▪️The US-brokered meeting between ambassadors was condemned by critics as a violation of Lebanon's constitution and National Pact.

💥__Yet on the other side of the same coin, the US is rushing an additional 10,000 troops & multiple warships to the Middle East. For peace, of course! Nope.__

🔍 **Why is there a ‘winged creature of hell’ in Trump’s Jesus image? - Tucker Carlson**

The since-deleted viral AI image of Trump portrayed as Jesus was deliberately altered, believes Tucker Carlson. 

The original image floating around the Internet earlier, although almost an exact copy of Trump’s, had only American soldiers hovering like angels. 

But what appeared in the second version looks like a mysterious horned creature.

💬 “The American soldier over the president as Jesus' head has been changed and is now, if you look very carefully, a demon, some kind of winged creature of hell,” says Carlson, adding:

So it goes from an image that suggests, you know, healing and light to an image that suggests nothing good. It suggests demonic power because there is a demon in it.”

full_text:
🇮🇱🤥🇱🇧**Trump claims credit for first Israel-Lebanon leader talks in three decades**

Trump went on Truth Social to take credit for having arranged the direct exchange between the two leaders.

💬“Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon,” he wrote, adding:

“It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years. It will happen tomorrow. Nice!”

The announcement follows the first direct high‑level talks at the State Department between the two countries since 1993 - and the first personal contact between their ambassadors in their entire history of relations.

**💵****💣 US Senate votes to keep bulldozers and bombs flowing to Israel**

40 US senators tried to block the sale of military bulldozers and bombs to Israel — and failed.

The Republican-led Senate rejected the measures **59–40 (bulldozers)** and **63–36 (bombs)**, allowing shipments to proceed despite growing backlash, American media reported.

💬 “US taxpayers must not keep funding the Netanyahu government’s mass killing and displacement of civilians,” Senator Bernie Sanders said.

☠️ Didn’t matter. All approved — again.
